title: Treatment device for walkable surfaces, as for example floors
abstract: Hand-guided treatment device (15) adapted to clean, to sanitize and to dry such surfaces (19)and comprising a guiding body (16) joined below, through an articulated element (14), to a unit(18) for cleaning, sanitizing and drying such surfaces (19), said unit (18) comprising a component elements assembly (33), in turn being being substantially constituted by at least a first cleaning, sanitizing and drying rotating motorized means (36), by one or more wetting and heating means (37) of said first rotating means (36), by at least a second cleaning means (38) of said first cleaning means (36), by at least a container (40, 52) for collecting the filth, by at least a sensor means (39) for detecting the moisture of the coating element (44) of said first rotating motorized means (36).
claims:
Claims Claims [Claim 1] 1. Hand-guided treatment device (15) for walkable surfaces (19), as for example floors, adapted to clean, to sanitize and to dry such surfaces (19) and comprising a guiding body (16) extended upward and ending with a control handle (17) and joined below through an articulated element (14), as for example an universal joint, to a unit (18) for cleaning, sanitizing and drying such surfaces (19), such handle (17) being provided with command means (20) for such a device (15), said guiding body (16) having housed inside it at least a control and command electronic circuit board (22), which is adapted to control and to command all the electric and electronic elements and/or components and/or means of the device (15) on the basis of pre-set parameters, which are selected through said actuation and selection means (20), and being powered by at least an electrical transformer means (23), in turn it is connected to the power grid through a power cable (24), at least a first reservoir (26) and at least an electrical pumping means (27), as for example an electropump, being also housed into said guiding body (16) and connected to said electronic circuit board (22) and to the electrical transformer (23), said unit (18) being constituted by component elements assembly (33) inserted into a stiff and shell-shaped casing (34), this latter being opened on its lower part and provided at its lower part with at least a free wheel (41), for allowing to move the device (15), and being provided on its upper part with an upper opening (35), in correspondence of the articulated element (14), adapted to connect the component elements of the guiding body (16) and said component elements assembly (33), characterized in that said component elements assembly (33) is substantially constituted by at least a first cleaning, sanitizing and drying rotating motorized means (36) for surfaces (19), by one or more wetting and heating means (37), arranged on the upper and back part of said first cleaning means (36), by at least a second cleaning means (38) arranged into contact with the rear part of said first cleaning means (36), by at least a container (40, 52) for collecting the filth, arranged on the rear part of said first cleaning means (36), by at least a sensor means (39) for detecting the moisture, arranged into contact with the front part of said first cleaning means (36), said rotating motorized means (36) being constituted by a cylindrical shaped rotating tool (42), arranged in a rotating manner in the lower 

 part of said casing (34) and with a rotating axis that is parallel to the surface (19), and being provided internally with an electrical means (43) of actuation in rotation, as for example an axial electrical motor, and externally being provided on its longitudinal surface with an absorbent coating element (44), in such a way that the cylindrical rotating tool (42) rotates, actuated at least in one direction of motion by the electrical means (43) of actuation in rotation, by remaining into contact with the surface (19) with its lower longitudinal profile, while the device (15) in the operation state thereof is moved, thereby be able to rub efficaciously said surface (19), said wetting and heating means (37) comprising at least a delivering element (46, 61, 73) and at least a heating element (47, 59â, 74), this latter including in turn at least a detection and regulating temperature means (58, 66, 80), at least said first reservoir (26) being adapted to contain the cleaning liquids, as for example water, and being connected with its outlet to the electrical pumping means (27), in turn connected to the delivering element (46, 59â, 73), in such a way to draw the liquid from said first reservoir (26) and to convey such a liquid to the coating element (44) of the rotating tool (42), while said heating element (47, 61, 74) being adapted to heat automatically the coating element (44) at a pre-set temperature by co operating with the electronic circuit board (22) thanks to the tem perature detection and regulating means (58, 66, 80), constituted as for example by a thermostat or a thermistor of the NTC type, cooperating with the same electronic circuit board (22) in such a way that this latter activates or not the heating, said moisture sensor means (39) being adapted to detect the moisture present in the coating element (44), while the cylindrical tool (42) rotates, by cooperating with the electronic circuit board (22), in such a way that this latter commands or not the additional wetting of the absorbing element (44) through the wetting and heating means (37) in the bases of a pre-set moisture value, said second cleaning means (38) being adapted to wring out the coating element (44) of the rotating tool (42), let to fall the filth in at least a lower container (40, 52). [Claim 2] 2. Device according to claim 1, characterized in that said coating element (44) is constituted by a lower multilayer sponge element (44â), to which a microfiber fabric (44â) is overlapped. [Claim 3] 3. Device according to claim 1, characterized in that said delivering element (46) is constituted by a pipe (48) provided at its lower opened 

 end portion with at least a delivering nozzle (49) and connected with its upper end portion to the electrical pumping means (27), said delivering nozzle (49) being arranged above and near to the rear part of said coating element (44), for wetting this latter with the liquid that is pumped by the same electrical pumping means (27), and that said heating element (47) is constituted by a body (56) made of aluminium and shaped for following the shape and dimensions of the upper part of the cylindrical rotating tool (42) and arranged into contact on it, and is provided with at least an electrical resistance (57), and with the tem perature detecting and regulating means (58), which are connected to and commanded by the electronic circuit board (22), in such a way that said electrical resistance (57) is adapted to heat the body made of aluminium (56) that in turn heats for contact the coating element (44), while said temperature detecting and regulating means (58) detects con tinuously the temperature of the body made of aluminium (56) by ac tivating or deactivating automatically said resistance (57), on the basis of the temperature value pre-set on the electronic circuit board (22), thanks to the commands (20). [Claim 4] 4. Device according to claim 1, characterized in that said heating means (59â) is a steam generator means (59), controlled and commanded by the electronic circuit board (22), connected with its inlet to the electrical pumping means (27) and at its outlet to said delivering element (61), which is provided with at least a lower delivering nozzle, that in turn is arranged spaced away above the upper part of the cylindrical rotating tool (42), by following its shape and dimensions, and is adapted to deliver liquid and/or steam on the coating element (44), and wherein said heating element (59â) is realized with a body made of metal (62), as for example aluminum, provided with at least two internal through ducts (63, 64) spaced away to each other, with at least an electrical resistance (65) that covers at least the path of two said ducts (63, 64) and with the temperature detecting and regulating means (66), that together the resistance (65) is connected to and commanded by the electronic circuit board (22) for the automatic control of the temperature, the first duct (63) being joined with its inlet (67), through pipes, to the electrical pumping means (27) and with its outlet (68) to the inlet (69) of the second duct (64), through a pipe (70) or equivalent, whereas the outlet (71) of the second duct (64) being joined to the inlet (72) of the delivering element (61), in such a way 

 that, the water drawn from the first reservoir (26) thanks the electropump (27) is eventually converted into steam inside the body made of metal (62) and consequently directed on the coating element (44) through the delivering nozzles of the delivering element (61), by maintaining a desired unvaried temperature thanks to the temperature detecting and regulating means (66), which detects continuously the temperature of the body made of metal (62) by activating or deac tivating said resistance (65), on the basis of the temperature value pre set into the electronic circuit board (22) thanks to the commands (20). [Claim 5] 5. Device according to claim 1, characterized in that said delivering means (73) is constituted by a pipe (75) provided at its lower opened end portion with a delivering nozzle (76), and is connected with its other end portion to, through pipes, to the electrical pumping means (27), said delivering nozzle (76) being arranged near the rear part of said cylindrical tool (42), for be able to wet the coating element (44) with the liquid pumped by said electrical pumping means (27), and that said heating element (74) is arranged spaced away above the cylindrical rotating tool (42) and is constituted by a semi-circular reflecting parabolic dish (77) with the concave part (78) thereof turned downward, and made of metal, as for example aluminum, and provided with an electrical incandescence resistance (79), adapted to heat by radiation the coating element (44), and with a temperature detecting and regulating means (80), this latter detecting continuously such a temperature of said parabolic dish (77) by activating or deactivating au tomatically said resistance (79), on the basis of the temperature value pre-set into the electronic circuit board (22) thanks to the commands (20). [Claim 6] 6. Device according to claim 1, characterized in that said second cleaning means (38) is arranged above the container (40) and is con stituted by at least an upper spring-loaded arm (51) provided in the front part thereof with an upper roller (51â) with horizontal axis and free rotation and made of stiff or semi-stiff material, as for example plastic or rubber, with a length identical to or greater than the one of the cylindrical rotating tool (42) and arranged behind and parallel with respect to this latter, by maintained into contact against the coating element (44) thanks to the spring-loaded arm (51). [Claim 7] 7. Device according to claim 1, characterized in that at least a second reservoir (29) is also housed into the guiding body (16), arranged in a 

 lower position with respect to the first reservoir (26), and is connected with its outlet at least to an electrical vacuum means (32), as for example an electrical vacuum motor of the WD type, in turn connected to and commanded by the electronic circuit board (22), said second reservoir (29) being connected with its inlet to the outlet of at least a duct (45, 53) arranged into the unit (18), in such a way that the electrical vacuum means (32) sucks possible remaining filth, as powder, after the treatment of the surface (19) and by conveying such a filth into said second reservoir (29), while the device (15) is set in the operative state thereof. [Claim 8] 8. Device according to claim 7, characterized in that said duct (45) is constituted by a stiff or semi-stiff pipe with its inlet (54â) opened and arranged frontally in such a way to graze the surface (19). [Claim 9] 9. Device according to claim 7, characterized in that said second cleaning means (38) is constituted at least by an upper spring-loaded arm (51) fixed to the unit (18) and provided frontally with an upper roller (5G) with horizontal axis and with free rotation and to which the lower collecting container (52) is arranged under it, said roller (5G) being realized of stiff or semi-stiff material, as for example plastic or rubber, with e length identical to or greater than the one of the cylindrical rotating tool (42) and arranged behind and parallel with respect to this latter, being maintained into contact against the coating element (44) thank to the spring-loaded arm (51), said container (52) being fixed and connected at its back part, through said duct (53), to the second reservoir (29), in such a way that the liquid and the filth collected into such a reservoir (52) are sucked and conveyed into said second reservoir (29) through the electrical vacuum means (32), while the device (15) is set in the operative state thereof. [Claim 10] 10. Device according to claims 7 and 9, characterized in that said ducts (45, 53) are both connected to said second reservoir (29) by means of a flow switch (54), which is constituted by a three-way chamber (54â) containing a little tilting plate (55) hinged at its end portions and commanded by a mechanical command (55â) arranged on the upper external part of the casing (34), and this plate (55) is adapted to lock se lectively the suction flow of the duct (45) by letting free the suction flow from the container (52) through the duct (53), or vice-versa to lock the suction flow from the container (52) by letting free the suction flow of the duct (45). 

 [Claim 11] 11. Device according to one of preceding claims, characterized in that it is electrically powered through the use of the power cable (24) connected to the power grid or through the use of an internal battery (25) of the rechargeable type, arranged into said guiding body (16), such an internal battery (25) recharges automatically through the electrical transformer (23) while the device (15) is connected with the power cable (24) to the power grid.
